fireball.name: Fireball
fireball.description: Launches a searing ball of fire. Devastating to cold-themed foes.

ice_shard.name: Ice Shard
ice_shard.description: Fires a jagged shard of frost. Effective against fire-themed foes.

heal.name: Heal Spell
heal.description: A restorative prayer that heals 25 HP. Can be cast in or out of combat.

thunderbolt.name: Thunderbolt
thunderbolt.description: Fires a bolt of pure lightning. Bypasses 50% of the target's armor defense.

divine_smite.name: Divine Smite
divine_smite.description: Calls down blinding holy wrath. Deals double damage to undead enemies.
